title: Deterministic Repair Runtime Fixup — Task List
based_on: Robustness assessment — worker has zero admin_repair awareness, no persistence, no e2e tests

tasks.title: Worker-side admin_repair mode awareness
tasks.description: Add admin_repair mode handler in worker loop and preflight gate so the worker understands it should follow a deterministic repair procedure rather than use LLM improvisation

tasks.title: Add deterministic_repair as known capability class
tasks.description: Register 'deterministic_repair' in ExecutionEnvelope.KNOWN_CAPABILITY_CLASSES so the hub can grant it and the worker can recognise it

tasks.title: Persist outcome memory to database
tasks.description: Connect build_repair_outcome_memory_entry and track_repair_outcomes to a database repository so the system learns from past repairs

tasks.title: Add error handling in deterministic_repair_path_service.py
tasks.description: Wrap all public functions in try/except blocks with meaningful fallbacks instead of KeyError crashes

tasks.title: Fix build_deterministic_repair_foundation_snapshot diagnosis-only scope
tasks.description: The snapshot currently always runs a full apply with approved_mutations=True. It must respect execution_scope and skip apply when scope is diagnosis_only

tasks.title: Replace synthetic LLM proposal with real LLM integration
tasks.description: The convert_llm_proposal_to_reviewed_procedure function currently returns hardcoded dummy steps. Wire it to an actual LLM call via generate_text or HubLLMService

tasks.title: Add repair_procedure field to ExecutionEnvelope
tasks.description: Add an optional RepairProcedure model to ExecutionEnvelope so the hub can pass structured deterministic repair steps that the worker must follow

tasks.title: Wire deterministic_repair_foundation into task delegation payload
tasks.description: Currently the deterministic analysis lives only in goal.mode_data. Pass it into the task's worker_execution_context so the worker actually receives it

tasks.title: Add end-to-end test for full admin_repair flow
tasks.description: Create a test that creates an admin_repair goal, plans it, materializes tasks, dispatches to a worker, and verifies the deterministic procedure is followed

tasks.title: Integration test: worker receives and follows deterministic procedure
tasks.description: Test that a worker receiving a task with repair_procedure in the ExecutionEnvelope executes the steps in order, performs verification, and reports back correctly
